posts.title: Architect Arc Sydney and Melbourne: Turning AI ambition into real-time execution
posts.description: Event recap covering Tealium's Architect Arc conferences in Australia, focusing on moving AI from experimentation to production through real-time context infrastructure and practical AI patterns.

posts.title: What Becomes Possible with the Right Context
posts.description: Final article in a series exploring how proper contextual infrastructure enables customer representations, simulation testing, and multi-agent coordination in enterprise AI.

posts.title: Everyone Is Saying the Same Thing. A Recap of the 2026 Snowflake Summit
posts.description: Conference summary highlighting how governed, contextual data addresses the primary barrier to scaling AI, and introducing Tealium Audience Discovery as a Snowflake Native App.

posts.title: The Context Has to Keep Up
posts.description: Third installment examining how AI agents require continuous, bidirectional context with living permission and closed-loop architecture rather than static profiles.

posts.title: What is The AI Data Layer?
posts.description: Technical exploration of the next generation data infrastructure that composes governed context for AI systems, building on Universal and Customer Data Layers.

posts.title: What Duchamp Figured Out About Your Context Window
posts.description: Conceptual essay drawing parallels between art history and AI context, arguing that 'the frame is the argument' in both domains.

posts.title: The Behavioral Funnel Is Not Dead
posts.description: Analysis suggesting behavioral data evolves rather than disappears in agent-driven environments, with different signal patterns across transaction types.

posts.title: Digital Velocity NYC: From Collection to Action in the Age of AI Agents
posts.description: Event coverage presenting five actionable steps for making websites agent-ready, measuring AI referrals, closing ML loops, and piloting agentic front doors.
